userText: We could improve coding efficiency use AI.
correctedText: We could improve learning efficiency by using AI tools.

issues.note: 'improve [X] use AI' → 'improve [X] by using AI'; to express method/means, use 'by + gerund', not a bare verb
issues.suggestion: Pattern: [achieve something] by using / by applying / by doing — 'by + gerund' expresses HOW you do something
